name: SEM
description: A post-hoc, zero-shot debiasing framework that operates in a Sparse Autoencoder (SAE) latent space to pinpoint and modulate bias-relevant neurons in Vision-Language Models.

name: C2B
description: An unsupervised, task-agnostic framework for discovering biases in pretrained visual classifiers using LLM-generated bias proposals and text-to-image retrieval.

name: DVMS
description: A PyTorch-based Deep Variational Learning framework for multiple trajectory prediction of 360° head movements.

name: SMART360
description: A 360° streaming simulation environment and preprocessing pipeline to compare motion prediction and adaptive bitrate (ABR) strategies in virtual reality.

name: PEM360
description: A processing suite and dataset of 360° videos with continuous physiological measurements, subjective emotional ratings, and motion traces. Includes tools for computing saliency and emotional maps.
